---
title: Evaluation and Inter-comparison of Acid Deposition Models for the UK
date: '2013-01-01'
author:
- A.J. Dore
- D. Carslaw
- C. Chemel
- R.G. Derwent
- B.E.A. Fisher
- S.J. Griffiths
- S. Lawrence
- S.E. Metcalfe
- A. Redington
- D. Simpson
- R. Sokhi
- P. Sutton
- M. Vieno
- J.D. Whyatt
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*NATO Science for Peace and Security Series C: Environmental Security*'
---

## Evaluation and Inter-comparison of Acid Deposition Models for the UK

<p class="pub-meta">A.J. Dore, D. Carslaw, C. Chemel, R.G. Derwent, B.E.A. Fisher, S.J. Griffiths, S. Lawrence, S.E. Metcalfe, A. Redington, D. Simpson, R. Sokhi, P. Sutton, M. Vieno, J.D. Whyatt</p>

_*NATO Science for Peace and Security Series C: Environmental Security*_, 2013


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2013-b.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
